mapper.sql: id, product_id, product_sku_name, product_sku_code, spec_info, sku_image, buy_count, quantity, weight, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert: insert into product_sku (id, product_id, product_sku_name, product_sku_code, spec_info, sku_image, buy_count, quantity, weight, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productSkuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productSkuCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skuImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

mapper.update:
update product_sku
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
product_sku_name = #{productSkuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_sku_code = #{productSkuCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
spec_info = #{specInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sku_image = #{skuImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
buy_count = #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update product_sku set product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, product_sku_name = #{productSkuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_sku_code = #{productSkuCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spec_info = #{specInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sku_image = #{skuImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, buy_count = #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into product_sku (id, product_id, product_sku_name, product_sku_code, spec_info, sku_image, buy_count, quantity, weight, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productSkuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productSkuCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.specInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.skuImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into product_sku (id, product_id, product_sku_name, product_sku_code, spec_info, sku_image, buy_count, quantity, weight, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productSkuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productSkuCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skuImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}) on duplicate key update id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, product_sku_name = #{productSkuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_sku_code = #{productSkuCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spec_info = #{specInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sku_image = #{skuImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, buy_count = #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}

on duplicate key update
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
product_sku_name = #{productSkuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_sku_code = #{productSkuCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update: update product_sku set quantity= quantity -#{num,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id=#{productSkuId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and quantity>=#{num}
update product_sku set quantity= quantity +#{num,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id=#{productSkuId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
